description: Create a reusable onboarding plan named "New Employee Onboarding" containing four 'To-Do' activity templates: "Set up workstation and IT accounts" (Responsible: Coach), "Complete new hire paperwork" (Responsible: Employee), "Schedule orientation meeting" (Responsible: Manager), and "Assign onboarding buddy" (Responsible: Coach). Launch this plan for employee Eli Lambert (Research & Development) and ensure the activities are scheduled on his record.

expected_templates.summary: Set up workstation and IT accounts
